generate.customTip: Tip: Be specific about what you want to post about. AI will help you create engaging content based on your topic.
generate.aiIdea1Text: This weekend only! Get 20% off all our products. Perfect time to treat yourself or find that special gift. Visit us in-store or shop online. Limited time offer!

generate.aiIdea2Text: "Absolutely love this place! The quality is outstanding and the service is exceptional. Highly recommend!" - Maria K. Thank you for your amazing support!

location.aiDataUsageInfo: Location type, marketing strategy and "Strengths" points from the analysis below are sent directly to the daily suggestions and weekly plan as confirmed venue facts. The more accurate the analysis, the more location-specific the ideas become.

empty.descExisting: You have a saved plan for this week. Choose to load it or generate a new one.
empty.descCurrentWeek: Build your brand week by week. The weekly plan mixes sales posts with your venue's story — atmosphere, people and values — so you don't just sell, but build an audience that keeps coming back.
empty.descNextWeek: Build your brand week by week. The weekly plan mixes sales posts with your venue's story — atmosphere, people and values — so you don't just sell, but build an audience that keeps coming back.

errors.strategyFailed: Strategy generation timed out. Click "Generate weekly plan" to try again.

weather.staleAlert: The weather forecast is now more accurate than when the plan was generated — update the weather for the latest estimates for the weekend.
weather.noChange: Weather hasn't changed significantly — no reason to generate a new plan.
weather.changedNoImpact: Weather has changed, but no posts in the plan appear to be affected.

weather.changedImpact_other: Weather has changed significantly — {{count}} posts may be affected: {{posts}}
weather.considerNew: Consider generating a new plan so the suggestions account for the updated weather.
weather.heavyRainWeek: Heavy rain week — {{rainDays}} out of {{totalDays}} days with rain
weather.winterWeek: Winter-like week with snow on {{snowDays}} days
weather.mixedWeek: Mixed week — {{sunnyDays}} ⛅ days and {{rainDays}} rainy days
weather.weekendRain: Rain at the weekend increases spontaneous indoor visits — use it for atmosphere or experience posts.
